transcript:
CALLER: Yeah hi, I was hoping to schedule a consultation. For myself. Uh, general physician kind of thing.
AGENT: Hello! Sure, I can help you book a GP consultation. May I have your name please?
CALLER: Aditi Wagh. W-A-G-H.
AGENT: Got it, Aditi. And your phone number?
CALLER: It's 8800912345.
AGENT: Thank you. Our general physician Dr. Ramesh Iyer has slots tomorrow morning — 9 AM, 10 AM, and 11:30 AM. Any preference?
CALLER: Umm, can I do 10 AM? Is that still available?
AGENT: Yes, 10 AM is available. Should I go ahead and book it?
CALLER: Yes please.
AGENT: Done! Aditi Wagh, tomorrow at 10:00 AM with Dr. Ramesh Iyer. You'll get an SMS with the details. Anything else I can help with?
CALLER: No, that's great. Thanks a lot.
